title: HealthFacility
description: A DOHMH-operated or -listed public health facility — a Sexual Health (STD) Clinic, immunization/TB clinic, or other service site surfaced by the NYC Health Map. Reverse-engineered from the NYC Health Map facility finder (a816-health.nyc.gov/NYCHealthMap) and the /services/allclinics and /services/sexual-health-clinics pages; there is no open dataset for this, so it is a structured proposal.

facilityId.description: Facility identifier (proposed; NYC Health Map internal id).

serviceCategory.description: Service category, e.g. 'Sexual Health Clinic', 'Immunization', 'Tuberculosis', 'Lead Poisoning', 'Mental Health'.

servicesOffered.description: Specific services offered at the site.
